testsuite.name: com.ikoro.android.domain.identity.IdentityDerivationTest

testcase.name: same mnemonic derives same nostr bech32 keys
evm address starts with 0x and is 42 chars
bip39 mnemonic has 12 words and validates

testsuite.system-err: SLF4J: No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.
